title: Inspection Mechanics
description: Costly inspections of caravans occur during crackdowns. If caught, players face large fines. Inspections are more likely with larger shipments and during crackdown periods. Successful inspections expose contraband.
definition-of-done: Inspection events can occur. Inspection probability based on factors. Caught smuggling results in fines. Inspection events have visual/narrative presentation.
testing-plan: Verify inspections trigger correctly. Test probability factors. Verify fines apply on detection. Test event presentation.
todos: Build fine mechanics for caught smuggling
